  \caption{Calibration targets vs.\ simulated pre-shock moments (\emph{M6}, $t=9$, mean across replicates)}

    \toprule
    Moment & Target & Simulated \\
    \midrule
    Native employment rate & 0.815 & 0.959 \\
    Migrant employment rate & 0.670 & 0.963 \\

\end{table}
